uplink.description: TTN example 1: radiation block + battery flagged
uplink._note: expected.data from running reference/upstream-codec.js (oracle): incoming 0x8099=32921 -> (32921-32768)/10=15.3 W/m² -> air.solarIrradiance; reflected 0x8022=32802 -> 3.4 W/m² -> reflectedRadiation; albedo 34/153=0.2222222222222222; battery 0x0BD3=3027 mV -> 3.027 V.

uplink.description: TTN example 2: battery only (radiation flag clear)
uplink._note: flags=0x0002 -> only bit1 (battery) set; upstream oracle emits no radiation keys. battery 0x0BD3=3027 mV -> 3.027 V.

uplink.description: Synthetic: radiation block only, large irradiance values
uplink._note: flags=0x0001 -> only radiation block. incoming 0x8FA0=36768 -> (36768-32768)/10=400 W/m²; reflected 0x8064=32868 -> 10 W/m²; albedo 100/4000=0.025. Matches upstream oracle exactly.
version byte 1 != 2; mirrors upstream guard which returns an error string.
